search_document:
User Request: Sales KPI dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customer Regions
Type: table
Description: Regions with highest customer spending
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue
Title: Sales by Product Category
Type: chart
Description: Revenue breakdown by product category
Title: Order Volume
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customer Regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.Region, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSpending FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID GROUP BY c.Region ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Sales by Product Category
sql_queries.sql: SELECT cat.CategoryName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Categories cat ON p.CategoryID = cat.CategoryID GROUP BY cat.CategoryName ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Order Volume
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders
